title: dewT operation
description: Dew-point temperature at fixed pressure: find the T at which the first liquid droplet condenses from a saturated vapour of the given composition.  Solved by Newton-1D in T on Sum_i y_i / K_i(T) = 1.  Hardware-only: specify the pressure P; the dew temperature is the RESULT.

P.title: Pressure
P.description: System pressure at which the dew point is evaluated.
